cases.title: [Sign Up] Verify that the signup page renders with all required fields and controls
cases.preconditions: none

steps.content: Navigate to the Sign Up page.
steps.expected: Sign Up page should be displayed.

steps.content: Verify the Email address field is present and marked as mandatory.
steps.expected: Email address field should be visible and marked as a required field.

steps.content: Verify the Website field is present and marked as mandatory.
steps.expected: Website field should be visible and marked as a required field.

steps.content: Verify the Password field is present and marked as mandatory.
steps.expected: Password field should be visible and marked as a required field.

steps.content: Verify the show/hide toggle (eye icon) is present on the Password field.
steps.expected: Eye icon should be visible on the Password field.

steps.content: Verify the Terms and Conditions & Privacy Policy checkbox is present.
steps.expected: Checkbox with "I accept the Terms and Conditions & Privacy Policy" text should be visible and unchecked by default.

steps.content: Verify the "Get Started" button is present.
steps.expected: "Get Started" button should be visible and interactive.

steps.content: Verify the "Log In" link is present for users who already have an account.
steps.expected: "Log In" link should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Replaced pure layout/copy case with per-element presence checks following page top-to-bottom structure. Dropped title/subtitle alignment, placeholder copy text, and client testimonial position checks.

cases.title: [Sign Up] Verify that the "Log In" link on the signup page navigates to the login page
cases.preconditions: User is on the Sign Up page.

steps.content: Click the "Log In" link.
steps.expected: The Login page should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Stripped display-verify step for the "Already have an account?" text; kept only the functional navigation assertion.

cases.title: [Sign Up] Verify that completing signup with valid credentials creates an account and sends a verification email
cases.preconditions: none

steps.content: Navigate to the Sign Up page.
steps.expected: Sign Up page should be displayed.

steps.content: Enter a valid email address, website URL, and password in the corresponding fields.
steps.expected: User should be able to enter values in all fields.

steps.content: Check the "I accept the Terms and Conditions & Privacy Policy" checkbox.
steps.expected: Checkbox should be checked.

steps.content: Click "Get Started".
steps.expected: The onboarding / banner setup page should be displayed.

steps.content: Verify that a verification email with subject "Verify your email for CookieYes" is received at the registered email address.
steps.expected: Verification email should be received.

cases.rewrite_notes: Stripped "user should be allowed to enter" filler expected results; added email receipt as an explicit verification step (it was an implicit expected result in the source).

cases.title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting the signup form without an email shows a validation error
cases.preconditions: User is on the Sign Up page.

steps.content: Enter a website URL and password, leaving the email field empty.
steps.expected: Values should be entered in website and password fields.

steps.content: Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
steps.expected: Checkbox should be checked.

steps.content: Click "Get Started".
steps.expected: "Email is required" error message should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Stripped filler expected results.

cases.title: [Sign Up] Verify that submitting signup with an already-registered email shows a validation error
cases.preconditions: User is on the Sign Up page. An existing account is registered with a known email address.

steps.content: Enter the existing account's email address in the email field.
steps.expected: Email address should be entered.

steps.content: Enter a valid website URL and password.
steps.expected: Values should be entered.

steps.content: Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
steps.expected: Checkbox should be checked.

steps.content: Click "Get Started".
steps.expected: "The email has already been taken." error message should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Stripped filler expected results; added precondition for pre-existing account.

steps.content: Check the Terms and Conditions checkbox.
steps.expected: Checkbox should be checked.

steps.content: Click "Get Started".
steps.expected: "Valid email required" error message should be displayed.

cases.title: [Sign Up] Verify that clicking "Verify Email" in the signup confirmation email opens the email verification success page
cases.preconditions: User has completed signup with a new email address [C65]. The inbox contains a "Verify your email for CookieYes" email.

steps.content: Open the "Verify your email for CookieYes" email in the inbox.
steps.expected: Verification email should be present and opened.

steps.content: Click the "Verify Email" button in the email.
steps.expected: The email verification success page should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Collapsed C2109 and C67 — C2109 verified email receipt and body copy; C67 verified the button click. After dropping copy-check steps from C2109 (static email body text), the two cases share the same behavioral scenario. C67 used as base.

cases.title: [Sign Up] Verify that clicking "Go to Dashboard" after email verification navigates to the Dashboard
cases.preconditions: User has clicked "Verify Email" and is on the email verification success page. [C67]

steps.content: Click "Go to Dashboard".
steps.expected: Dashboard page should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Stripped layout/copy steps (title alignment, green tick image, static success text); kept only the functional navigation step. Step count is inherently short for this terminal-action case.

cases.title: [Sign Up] Verify that clicking an expired verification email link shows a failure page with a resend option
cases.preconditions: User has signed up [C65] but has not verified their email within 1 hour. The original "Verify your email for CookieYes" email is still in the inbox.

steps.content: Open the "Verify your email for CookieYes" email (more than 1 hour after signup).
steps.expected: Email should be accessible in the inbox.

steps.content: Click "Verify Email".
steps.expected: "Your email verification failed!" page should be displayed.

steps.content: Click "Resend Verification Email".
steps.expected: A new verification email should be received at the registered address and a "Verification email has been resent successfully." notification should appear.

cases.rewrite_notes: Chained reference C44 becomes a precondition; stripped "user is allowed to open email" filler.

cases.title: [Sign Up] Verify that clicking a verification link after account deletion shows a failure page
cases.preconditions: User completed signup [C65] but deleted their account before verifying email. The original "Verify your email for CookieYes" email is still in the inbox.

steps.content: Open the "Verify your email for CookieYes" email from the inbox.
steps.expected: Email should be accessible.

steps.content: Click "Verify Email".
steps.expected: "Your email verification failed!" page should be displayed with a "Resend Verification Email" button.

steps.content: Click "Resend Verification Email".
steps.expected: A new verification email should be received at the registered address and a success notification should appear. [inferred — C70 states notification + email received; C1148 states "Login Page displayed"; C70 expected result used as it is more specific; discrepancy should be manually verified]

cases.rewrite_notes: Collapsed C70 and C1148 — after stripping layout/copy steps from C1148 (logo alignment, red cross display, body text), remaining behavioral steps are identical to C70. C70 used as base. Discrepancy noted: C70 and C1148 differ on the expected result of the Resend button — C70 says email + notification, C1148 says Login page displayed.

steps.content: Verify the "Log In" button is present.

steps.content: Verify the "Forgot your password?" link is present.

steps.expected: "Sign Up" link should be visible and interactive.

steps.content: Click "Log In".
steps.expected: Login page should be displayed.

cases.rewrite_notes: Collapsed navigation setup into precondition; stripped display-verify step for the button.

cases.title: [Forgot Password] Verify that clicking Reset Password with an expired token shows a token error
cases.preconditions: User initiated a password reset more than 1 hour ago and has the original "Password Reset Request" email in their inbox. [C92]

steps.content: Open the "Password Reset Request" email and click "Reset Password".
steps.expected: Reset Password page should be displayed.

steps.content: Enter the registered email address and matching new/confirm passwords.
steps.expected: All fields should be filled.

steps.content: Click "Reset Password".
steps.expected: "This password reset token is invalid." error message should be displayed below the confirm password field.

cases.rewrite_notes: Collapsed navigation setup into precondition; stripped filler expected results; time-expiry condition captured in precondition.
